measurements.method: in-process handler timing over 30 iterations x 3 read endpoints (outlet_dashboard, liquidity_projections, anomaly_flags); excludes network/serialization transport
measurements.limitations: In-process timing on a single connection; not a networked load test.

measurements.method: in-process handler timing over 30 iterations x 3 read endpoints (outlet_dashboard, liquidity_projections, anomaly_flags); excludes network/serialization transport
measurements.limitations: In-process timing on a single connection; not a networked load test.

measurements.method: published high-impact alerts whose EN explanation has all sections (situation, evidence, uncertainty, next_step) / total published high-impact alerts
measurements.limitations: Held-out published alerts only; completeness checks non-empty text, not quality.

measurements.method: provider feed assessments with status in {stale,missing,conflicting} / total provider assessments across held-out runs
measurements.limitations: Synthetic feeds; incidents are seeded via Scenario C fault injection.
